sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁחט

Transliteration: shâchaṭ

Phonetic: shaw-khat'

BDB Definition:

  1. to beat, hammer
    1. (Qal) beaten (participle)
  2. (TWOT) to kill, slaughter

Origin: a primitive root [identical with H7819 through the idea of striking]

TWOT entry: 2362

Part(s) of speech: Verb
